source_pr.title: plan: change the logic of converting to index join
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

Race occurs in race test. It's caused by the sql added in the unit-test.
Original sql is optimized to that one after https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/7276
Fix https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/7551

In such case, the index join may just be as well as hash join, not better than it. And even worse since it has redundant expression evaluation.
This pr mainly to make **the hint** work in this case.

### What is changed and how it works?

Make the filters that index join uses to build range more strict.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

symptoms: Race occurs in race test. It's caused by the sql added in the unit-test.
failure_signature: Race occurs in race test. It's caused by the sql added in the unit-test.
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. Exact plan/EXPLAIN assertions are brittle when optimizer choices can vary. This PR stabilizes it by: plan: change the logic of converting to index join.
fix_pattern: plan: change the logic of converting to index join

evidence: evidence: Race occurs in race test. It's caused by the sql added in the unit-test.
